articles.author: Russell Brandom
articles.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’ - TechCrunch
articles.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.
articles.content: Earlier this week, Google rolled out a completely new Search experience, foregrounding AI summaries and kicking the traditional “10 blue links” far down the page. But the sheer scale of Google Search… [+1036 chars]

articles.author: Farah Elbahrawy, Michael Msika
articles.title: BofA’s Hartnett Warns Mega-IPOs Risk Bubble Like Roaring ‘20s - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Mega IPOs like those eyed by SpaceX and OpenAI threaten to push the weighting of tech in equity benchmarks beyond market-bubble levels of concentration, according to Bank of America Corp. strategist Michael Hartnett.
articles.content: Mega IPOs like those eyed by SpaceX and OpenAI threaten to push the weighting of tech in equity benchmarks beyond market-bubble levels of concentration, according to Bank of America Corp. strategist … [+349 chars]
